## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Start apksaw with `...`
2. Call tool `...` with parameters `...`
3. Observe error `...`

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages, tracebacks, or tool output.

```
Paste output here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| apksaw version | e.g. 0.1.0 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.12.3 |
| Operating system | e.g. macOS 14.5 / Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Connected device (if relevant) | e.g. Pixel 10a running Android 15 |
| ADB version (if relevant) | e.g. 35.0.2 |

## Additional context

Any other context that might help, e.g. the APK you were analysing (attach a sanitised sample if possible), the Claude model version, or MCP client in use.
